content.en:
The domain ancestors of the Devouring Clan, the White Bone Clan, and the Demon Hell Clan took action one after another, and they all took out powerful domain weapons, and the quality was much better than the domain weapons in the hands of these domain ancestors in the Daoshan Realm.

Moreover, they have mastered the domain art much better.

However, the Devouring Clan, the White Bone Clan, and the Demon Hell Clan are not cultivators after all, they are not following the path of cultivation, and their comprehension is not very strong, only a few demons can ignore the flaws of the race, and most of them are still relatively weak.

However, these evil clans in the Dark Destruction Domain are not the scattered cultivators in those realms of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and their overall strength can be much stronger, and their combat effectiveness is naturally not weak.

If the Devouring Clans in the Dao Mountain Realm were very weak in combat power, no matter how many they were, they would be of little use.

In addition to the Six Great Saint Sons, there were also several of the Domain Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain who could be called the top Domain Ancestors invincible, and even much stronger than the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestors.

Bang!!!

The battle is on!

The top domain ancestors such as the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor faced one of the top domain ancestors of the White Bone Clan, the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor, and the two sides fought, almost indistinguishable.

This Black Shock Domain Ancestor looks like a white bone, but his combat power is extremely powerful, and his white bones can be called the top domain weapon, he can almost ignore ordinary domain attacks, and his defense is really almost invincible, which is much more terrifying than the Golden Ding Domain Ancestor who fell before.

The attack of the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor could only slightly injure the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor, but the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor's attack was not weak, but it could really hurt the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor.

If it weren't for the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor, Feather Domain Ancestor, and Wind Eye Domain Ancestor, the top domain ancestors of the Three Great Dao Mountain Realms joining forces, if they were alone, they would not be the opponents of the Black Shock Domain Ancestor, and they would have been defeated in a short period of time.

In terms of the number of top domain ancestors, there were more than 300 in the Dark Destruction Domain, while there were only more than 200 top domain ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm, a gap of more than 100 in number.

As a result, a large number of elite domain ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm united to contend with a top domain ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain, and in this way, they could barely compete.

Basically, ten domain ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm fought one domain ancestor in the Dark Destruction Domain, relying on the number of people to suppress the domain ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain.

This is also no way, after all, the original Shentian Realm was only a medium-strength realm, and it was difficult to give birth to a relatively powerful domain ancestor, and the combat effectiveness of the same level was not very high.

Of course, at the ordinary Domain Ancestor and Elite Domain Ancestor levels, the Dao Mountain Realm now has an advantage, but the top Domain Ancestor level is completely at a disadvantage.

With the passage of time, if Ye Tian didn't make a move, the top domain ancestor was afraid that many people would fall.

Not far away.

The six holy sons are still watching the play.

"This is the top domain ancestor in the realm, it's too weak, isn't it? it's too weak than the rumored top domain ancestor of the dark holy realm. It is rumored that the top domain ancestor of the Dark Sacred Domain, one can beat several top domain ancestors of our Dark Destruction Domain, and the domain ancestor of our Dark Destruction Domain has always relied on numbers to win, but now it is the other way around!"

"No way, it's just a small realm, how can there be any genius?"

"Top Domain Ancestor level, this realm is too weak, I don't think we need to make a move, the Black Shock Domain Ancestor can kill these top Domain Ancestors, and then slaughter other elite Domain Ancestors and ordinary Domain Ancestors!"

Just when the Six Holy Sons were watching the play, Ye Tian's copy body made a move.

He also knew that the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestors were under a lot of pressure, and if he didn't make a move, these Domain Ancestors would probably want to escape.

Once you escape, it's a complete mess.

As soon as Ye Tian made a move, he set his sights on that Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor.

This Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor can be called the strongest under the Six Great Saint Sons, if he is killed, it will strike at the Domain Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain, and it can also allow the Ten Thousand Realm Domain Ancestors to relieve their pressure and support other Domain Ancestors.

The strength of the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor was not weak, if Ye Tian didn't use the Holy Technique, he really wouldn't be able to kill him in one blow.

"Then use the Holy Skill, it will be exposed anyway!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

I saw that Ye Tian used the Void Escape Holy Technique to appear in front of the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor in an instant, and immediately used the Domineering Holy Technique to bless the Heaven Slaying Spear in his hand, and with one blow, the body of the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor was shattered.

However, this blow did not kill the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor, because the life-preserving thing on his body was good, protecting him with a trace of vitality.

But then, with a flick of his fingers, Ye Tian performed the Golden Silk Saint Technique, instantly erasing the last trace of vitality of the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor.

Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor, Fall!

The speed at which the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor fell was so fast that even the six Holy Sons didn't react, so they didn't have time to rescue.

"What, Black Earthquake has fallen!!"

Several of the Holy Sons were shocked.

The strength of the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor is not weak, although it is not a genius, but it can be regarded as one of the strongest existences in the world, and it was killed in an instant.

"The man ......"

The eyes of several holy sons stared at Ye Tian one after another, and their eyes showed a solemn expression.

"He's the Holy One!"

Kanshui Holy Son said solemnly.

Several other holy sons naturally saw that Ye Tian had just performed the holy technique, and they could be regarded as having seen the holy technique, so they naturally knew that if they could display such a powerful holy technique from an ordinary domain ancestor, there was a high probability that they would be the Holy Endower.

After all, it is difficult for ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestors to practice a holy skill, and Ye Tiancai is an ordinary Domain Ancestor who cultivates and uses a holy skill to easily kill the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor, what is this not a Holy Endower?

Moreover, Ye Tian was not an ordinary saint endower, otherwise he would not be able to easily kill the Black Earthquake Domain Ancestor.

"How can there be a Holy Endowed here?"

The Divine Consciousness of the Dead Universe Divine Son continued to scan the surroundings, for fear that there were invincible domain ancestors or those very powerful supreme domain ancestors hidden in the dark.

After all, ordinary saint-endowed people must have guards, and such guards are at least the ancestral cultivators of the Supreme Domain!

"Don't worry, there shouldn't be any Supreme Domain Ancestor around, and this Holy Gifted is likely to be acting alone. I just used a secret technique to explore the surrounding area, and there is no aura of the Supreme Domain Ancestor. Unless you are an invincible domain ancestor, you will be able to evade my secret art detection. If there really is an invincible domain ancestor, we won't be able to escape no matter what. Therefore, at present, we can only hope that there is no invincible domain ancestor hidden around. "

Another Holy Son, the Holy Son of the Dark Eye, spoke.

At the same time, they also had an idea, if Ye Tian was a saint-endowed person acting alone.

If they killed an ordinary domain ancestor cultivator, this merit would be even greater than destroying a realm!
